title: Clément, Alex, and Everyone Else
original_title: Clément, Alex et tous les autres
overview: Clement is gay. Alex is gay. They are looking for a new roommate for their big apartment in Paris with only one demand: he must be gay. And they find Leo, a charming student who is in deep trouble to find a place to sleep. Leo will do anything to get that room, whatever it takes.

trailers.title: CLÉMENT, ALEX ET TOUS LES AUTRES - Bande Annonce VF
